title: Developer Designer
why_fit: skill overlap: Git, JavaScript, TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Developer Designer Mission His/Her mission is to analyze the project entrusted to him/her, according to the needs of the users, recorded in a specification provided by the client. She/He studies the operating stages of the program and then designs a technical solution for the creation of a prototype. She/He is then in charge of writing one or more parts of a program. The developer is also in charge of preparing and updating the technical documentation. Expertise and skills She/He knows the different computer languages and masters one or more. She/He knows how to translate customer requests and needs into lines of code. To accompany the digital transformation, she/he also masters Web languages (HTML, JavaScript ...). Customer focus, responsiveness, agility and above all creativity are important levers in terms of skills to succeed in his/her missions. Experience With a good general IT background, the developer designer at Sofrecom must be up-to-date on the latest innovations in programming. She/He must have a successful experience in computer development locally or abroad.

title: Work at Sofrecom
why_fit: skill overlap: Git, TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Work at Sofrecom Sofrecom is a specialist in the telecommunications sector. Our unique positioning serves an unparalleled network of clients, including operators, governments and international institutions. The Sofrecom adventure revolves around its history and values, its various projects and missions. PROJECTS We offer a wide range of missions that allow everyone to choose their own path. For examples: Data analysis and business intelligence for the successful deployment of fiber, Financial performance analysis on the B2B telco market in Africa, Evaluation of the business potential of Edge Computing , Managing an IT fiber project with agile methods, Design and Supervision of FTTH deployment in the Middle East, e-government plan and strategy in Niger, development of e-gouv solutions in agile mode in Tunisia Digital maturity assessment of an international operator. The profile of the clients we support enables our teams to advise high-level contacts, including CEOs of international operators, members of their executive committees, leaders of international institutions, digital development directors and public decision-makers from several governments. SOFRECOM KNOW-HOW NETWORK Sofrecom, an international group, operates as a single global company. Sofrecom deploys the same corporate culture in all its locations, based on boldness, agility and a universal desire to serve its clients well. During their assignments in France or abroad, Sofrecom consultants rely on both the teams at Head Office and subsidiaries to support their projects. This makes it possible to carry out projects all over the world and to build lasting relationships with leading personalities, both internally and with our clients and partners. Throughout their careers, Sofrecom employees benefit from personalised support, numerous training courses and opportunities to develop within the Orange Group. EMPLOYEE'S EXPERIENCE Team spirit and conviviality are essential values within our teams: beyond the teams projects, consultants take part in numerous collective activities and take part of the life of the company. As examples: In France, once a month, Sofrecom consultants meet at Head Office in Vincennes for team bonding purposes. Every quarter, they are gathered at a team event combining a spirit of conviviality with information about the profession. In Tunisia and Morocco, the teams meet regularly around sport activities such as football, fishing or sailing. Days dedicated to families are also organized. Consultants share their projects and achievements with their peers during monthly meetings, in order to capitalize on their different assignments and get to know each other better Day visits for young students are regularly organized to raise awareness about what we do. These days are led by volunteer consultants and engineers.. Our corporate social network allows everyone to stay in touch and be regularly informed of our news. title: Testeur
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Testeur Mission He/she makes sure that the software or application conforms to the customer’s specifications before delivery. He/she completes a preparatory and analyzis work: he/she sets a strategy, schedules the operations, develops testing tools, perform tests, analyzes the results and transmits his/her recommendations to the development team in charge of corrections. He/she is also in charge of the creation, updates and of the communication related to the technical documents /design linked to his/her mission. He/she maintains and updates the bug base and transmits the eventual needs to the development teams. Expertise and skills Mastery of the tested software Planning and follow up of the tests evolution in accordance with the specifications Experience With an engineer background (Bac+5), he/she has an at least 2 years experience. He/she is able to work in an Agile team. He/she masters the different methodologies of tests and has a successful experience in IT testing, locally or abroad. He/she also has some notions in software development. He/she has a good knowledge of English.

title: Strategic Marketing Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Strategic Marketing Consultant Mission The mission of strategic marketing consultant is to support customers in analyzing growth drivers and identifying value-creating positions. They decipher market trends, innovations and the movements of stakeholders. They analyze the abilities of customers to offer new services and quantify opportunities. Their intervention is with the marketing and strategic departments where they are responsible for providing decision-makers with new ideas. Expertise and skills Experts in marketing strategies, they possess great analytical and summarizing abilities which allow them to define a problem and organize discussions. They possess skills in market analysis and competitive intelligence, and have a head for numbers and modeling. Their ability to interact with the various business lines enables them to facilitate forward-looking discussions with operational staff and decision-makers. Experience Consultants must have had initial experience in: financial analysis market studies strategic analysis within marketing or innovation departments As part of the diversification of our customers' activities, our consultants may have a variety of backgrounds (telecoms, banking, energy, etc.) Creativity, an appetite for technology or an engineering education are advantages.

title: Mobile Financial Services consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Mobile Financial Services consultant Mission At Sofrecom, the mission of Mobile Financial Services (MFS) consultants is to support telecoms operators or banks in developing mobile financial services offers. They define the development strategy, identify the value proposition, participate in the construction of MFS offers by integrating structural regulatory changes. They also support operational implementation. Their role is to manage the project and mobilize the team to achieve the objectives and guarantee customer satisfaction. Expertise and skills They are experts in mobile financial services and the telecommunications sector. Their skills are in the field of marketing, strategy and business development. They must be able to combine an operational approach with real strategic thinking whilst remaining open-minded. Their interpersonal skills, their strong analytical and summarizing skills and their excellent ability to present facts enable them to complete consultancy missions with high-level contacts. They understand the environment of the AMEA region (Africa - Middle East - Asia) and have a perfect command of both English and French. Experience Graduates from major engineering or business schools or universities, MFS expert consultants must possess experience in a telecoms, consultancy firm and/or operator(s) environment. They must be willing to go on business trips abroad. Their backgrounds must include experience in the successful launch of MFS services covering the Go to Market strategy, identifying and structuring partnerships with banks or implementing distribution networks.

title: Marketing & Projects Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Marketing & Projects Consultant Mission He/she participates in the transformation of our customers in Africa, Asia and in the Middle East by contributing to: the design/improvement of the product and service, mobile, internet and convergent offering the strategic and/or operational Marketing the steering and improvement of the operational performance the management of transverse marketing project the coordination of marketing programs (PMO) Expertise and skills Management of transverse projects Ability to provide an operational approach and a real strategic view Experience Graduate from a top engineering, business school or university, he/she has at least a 2 years experience in Telecom environment, a consulting company and/or operator(s) in France or abroad.

title: Join us
why_fit: skill overlap: Next.js, TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Join us We guarantee equal treatment for all candidates. At Sofrecom, we are convinced that diversity is a factor of wealth and performance. We thus watch that our process of recruitment guarantees the equality of opportunity and in the fact that all the candidates benefits from an equality of treatment. Recruitment process Fully integrated to the Orange group, the Sofrecom's jobs are published and managed via Orange Jobs, the platform of recruitment of the group. The process of recruitment is managed by the specialists of recruitment of the group Orange. He(it) takes place in several stages. Evaluation of your application Evaluation of your application After sending your application, you will always receive an acknowledgment of receipt by email. Our sourcing team studies your application and confirms that it is complete. If we miss an item, our team will contact you. A recruitment officer studies your application with the greatest care. An answer is brought to you within a period not exceeding three weeks. Evaluation of your application Evaluation of your application After sending your application, you will always receive an acknowledgment of receipt by email. Our sourcing team studies your application and confirms that it is complete. If we miss an item, our team will contact you. A recruitment officer studies your application with the greatest care. An answer is brought to you within a period not exceeding three weeks. Screening interview Screening interview If your application is selected, you will be invited to a first interview with one of our recruitment consultants. She or he will be your single point of contact at Orange. This interview can take many forms, telephone, physical or video. During this first interview, we want to know more about your motivations and your skills. This is a mutual discovery, do not hesitate to ask questions about the position, the service, our Group and our strategy to your interlocutor. Screening interview Screening interview If your application is selected, you will be invited to a first interview with one of our recruitment consultants. She or he will be your single point of contact at Orange. This interview can take many forms, telephone, physical or video. During this first interview, we want to know more about your motivations and your skills. This is a mutual discovery, do not hesitate to ask questions about the position, the service, our Group and our strategy to your interlocutor. Interview with manager Interview with manager Following the HR interviews, we propose a reduced list of candidates to the recruiting manager. This interview is an opportunity to discuss in detail the content of the job and often to discover the work environment. Depending on the position, we sometimes offer several interviews with the different people on the team. Interview with manager Interview with manager Following the HR interviews, we propose a reduced list of candidates to the recruiting manager. This interview is an opportunity to discuss in detail the content of the job and often to discover the work environment. Depending on the position, we sometimes offer several interviews with the different people on the team. Your application has been successful Your application has been successful After various interviews, the recruiter chooses from the successful candidates. She/he often contacts you by phone to let you know the choice. If you are selected, you will receive a hiring proposal from our HR team and, of course, all the information to join our company. You will then receive by email a few days before your arrival, the necessary information for the job. If your application is not selected, you are informed, and if you wish we will explain the reasons. Your application has been successful Your application has been successful After various interviews, the recruiter chooses from the successful candidates. She/he often contacts you by phone to let you know the choice. If you are selected, you will receive a hiring proposal from our HR team and, of course, all the information to join our company. You will then receive by email a few days before your arrival, the necessary information for the job. If your application is not selected, you are informed, and if you wish we will explain the reasons. During the selection stages, we are likely to send you tests During the selection stages, we are likely to send you tests a language test: English is essential to your work at Sofrecom. This test is intended to ascertain your language proficiency. For certain positions, we may be required to send you a test for another language. a case study : The purpose of this study is to assess how you approach a professional situation that you may encounter while on an assignment with one of our clients. a personality test: This assesses certain dimensions of your personality and your expectations in a professional environment. It is governed exclusively by qualified individuals. It systematically generates feedback. This test is intended to ascertain your language proficiency. For certain positions, we may be required to send you a test for another language. a case study : The purpose of this study is to assess how you approach a professional situation that you may encounter while on an assignment with one of our clients. a personality test: This assesses certain dimensions of your personality and your expectations in a professional environment. It is governed exclusively by qualified individuals. It systematically generates feedback. You crossed all the stages of the recruitment successfully, what’s the next steps for you ? By joining us, you will benefit from an on-boarding seminar to : discover our company , its strategy, its stakes. introduce you to the main methods which constitute our know-how. meet Sofrecom’s team and become and active actor of Sofrecom’s know how network. Career path At Sofrecom, training is firmly at the heart of your career path. Our training programmes will enable you to be in control of your own professional development. They are divided into four different areas: Sofrecom’s Essentials International Missions Personal Development Common culture Our aim is to enable you to have a complete vision of an operator’s value chain and to increase your efficiency at work. A four-step career path At Sofrecom, you can build your career and progress by taking on greater responsibility. Junior Junior Contributes to studies, assignments or projects in a field of expertise. Junior Junior Contributes to studies, assignments or projects in a field of expertise. Senior Senior Manages assignments, studies or projects in several areas of expertise. Manages teams of consultants on assignments. Manages client relationships. Senior Senior Manages assignments, studies or projects in several areas of expertise. Manages teams of consultants on assignments. Manages client relationships. Manager Manager Manages assignments, studies or projects in all areas of expertise. Is responsible for the assignment budget. Manages client relationships. Encourages and promotes the creation of new offerings. Negotiates the proposals. Manager Manager Manages assignments, studies or projects in all areas of expertise. Is responsible for the assignment budget. Manages client relationships. Encourages and promotes the creation of new offerings. Negotiates the proposals. Senior Manager Senior Manager Is a player in the Business Unit's development strategy for the management committee in which they participate. Makes a target for turnover and margin requirements. Recruits, oversees and manages a team of consultants. Develops client/supplier partnerships. Represents the business unit. Their competences are: listening to the customer the ability to make strategic and operational recommendations support in the handling of solutions and methods by the customers Experience "Digital Innovation" consultants must have experience in France or abroad which is: Operational: within teams in charge of designing or developing digital products and services Consulting: with more strategic missions in the area of digital transformation or strategic recommendations in respect of digital offers or services

title: Change Management Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: Git, TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Change Management Consultant Mission At Sofrecom, change management consultants are responsible for the projects to transform and develop customer operator or government organizations. The projects entrusted to them may be linked to the modernization of the information system or to developments in the business lines brought about by the arrival of new technologies. They help their customers anticipate consequences, and put forward and implement the support plans needed to guarantee their success. They must ensure that change is understood at all levels of the company. They also ensure the involvement of those responsible for these changes. Their aim is to allow the organization to easily manage its transformation project. Expertise and skills Change management consultants are experts at auditing organizations. They also know how to analyze skills, systems and processes. They are fully competent in AGILE, co-construction and facilitation methods. Sociological and communication skills are an advantage. Consultants must be on the lookout for new approaches and tools concerning the application of change management. Experience A range of different experiences means they are able to work within a multidisciplinary team, at all levels of an organization. There are a number of change management consultant profiles: IS/Business - with experience in the deployment of tools Human Resources, organizations and training Project Manager (PMO) Marketing, Communication & Digital

title: Wholesale Senior Consultant

He/she has knowledge of Telecom regulations. Experience A graduate of a business school, engineering school or university, he/she has 5 years of experience in a Telecom environment, consulting firm and/or operator(s) in France or abroad. He/she is open-minded, curious and has a taste for challenge. He/she has a perfect command of English.

title: Telecom Project Manager

description: Telecom Project Manager Mission Within a technical pole, he/she intervenes in France and abroad on steering and governance activities for transformation projects. He/she conducts projects in line with budgets, deadlines and quality. He/she conducts, manages the project team and sets up a communication plan adapted for the stakeholders. Expertise and skills Familiarity with project management methodologies (Agile, pmp,…), he/she likes to transmit, alert and contribute to IT or Network transformation projects Co-construction with our customers of quality services Performance of an active watch on the telecom sector enabling him/her to make strategic and operational recommendations Ability to anticipate, customer focus and excellent relationships Experience With an engineer background or equivalent, he/she has an at least 5 years proven experience in telecom projects management. He/she has high adaptation capacities to various environments.

title: Service Platform Telecom Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Service Platform Telecom Consultant Mission He/she conducts the engineering, sizing, architectural design of the VAS platform solutions according to the functional and security requirements. He/she manages with the marketing, IT and network teams the technical implementation and the service validation from end to end. Expertise and skills Knowledge of the VAS service platforms such as IPTV, OCS, RCS, IMS, some of their functionalities as well as the associated protocols Customer focus Ability to exchange with professions (marketing, customer service) and techniques Knowledge of Agile methods Creativity Experience With a Telecom engineer background, he/she has an at least 5 years experience in VAS technical environments. He/she possesses a good vision of the telecom networks and a good knowledge of the service platform solutions and of the associated protocols. He/she must have an extensive experience of service platform architecture of one or several providers. He/she must have a successful experience with the platform roll out and integration of a VAS at an operator.

He/she manages customer relationship and leads sales actions from prospection to negotiation. He/she pilots the evolution of consulting services and is involved in the recruitment of consultants. Expertise and skills Ability to make recommendations on an expertise Strong customer relationship Ability to develop turnover Operation of missions Experience Graduate from a top engineering, business school or university, the senior manager has at least a 10 years experience in similar areas in an operator or a consulting company. title: Senior Data Analyst
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Senior Data Analyst Mission He/she supports our clients in the valorisation of their internal and external data. He/she intervenes alone or in a team, for example with other Data Analyst / Data scientist and Business Consultants, on analytical missions with the aim of optimizing: the customer experience the customer value quality of service on networks or on deployments of mobile (4G and 5G), fixed (fibre) and physical distribution networks (stores) Expertise and skills He/she has a good understanding of the strategic and operational issues of telecom operators and/or experience in a related sector (mobile financial services, mobile banking or media). He/she has a good knowledge of the Big Data and AI ecosystem and understands the data processing value chain. Experience A graduate of a business school, engineering school or university, he/she has 3 to 5 years of experience in telecoms or consulting. He/she is open-minded and has a perfect command of English.

title: Scrum Master
why_fit: multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Scrum Master Mission He/she masters Scrum (Agile development method) and makes sure that the scrums rituals are correctly applied within the project team. He/she checks throughout the project that the team is productive and efficient, by adopting a participative management method. His/her role is not to manage the project team, but to help it move forward, while working on the various areas for improvement. Within his/her team, he/she must train the staff on Agile practices and organize the various «rituals» of Scrum. Expertise and skills Demonstrates humility and empathy Pedagogy and diplomacy in order to ease the work of each member of the project team and ensure harmony within the group Perfect mastery of Scrum Very good interpersonal skills, sense of communication, adaptability, autonomy and team spirit. Experience With an engineer background (Bac+5), he/she masters the Agile manifesto and he/she has an at least 5 years experience of it. He/she also has knowledge in software development.

title: Mobile Core Telecom Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Mobile Core Telecom Consultant Mission Networks and services are continually evolving, and must adapt to more functional, technological, capability, performance, securing, interoperability and quality requirements in order to be able to offer and support new convergent and multi-play services. He/she supports the operators in defining their technical choices in order to move on to efficient and sustainable architectures and solutions. Expertise and skills Expert in Mobile Core Network (VoLTE, ePC) and in the associated infrastructures (SGSN, GGSN, P/SGW, PCC, AAA, DNS, STP, DRF, Diameter, SS7) Knowledge of the ETSI, 3GPP standards and of 3GPP interfaces Knowledge of Core Network providers solutions for Voice & Mobile Data, of one or several IP-based services, and/or of infrastructures of networks of fixed and mobile network operators Experience With a Telecom engineer background (or general engineer with a Telecom specialization), He/she has an at least 5 years experience. He/she is recognized for his/her ability to listen and his/her customer focus.

title: Mobile Access Networks Telecom Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Mobile Access Networks Telecom Consultant Mission He/she supports the transformation of networks into mobile very high-speed networks (3 G+, 4 G, 5 G) and IoT networks (LoRa and LTE-M particularly). Within the customer teams, he/she takes part in the setting up of major projects, from the introduction of new technologies and services, to the follow up of their implementation. Expertise and skills Radio engineering of networks evolution to 3G+ / LTE / LTE-M / 5G / LoRa Optimization and 2G, 3G, 4G radio setting Engineering of indoor solutions (Femto, Wifi) Steering of FUT / POC to validate the new radio features (particularly in the IoT domain) Experience With a Telecom engineer background (or general engineer with a Telecom specialization), he/she has an at least 5 years experience allowing him/her to develop skills in network infrastructure of mobile network operators and certain associated technologies (GSM, UMTS, LTE, LTE-M, LoRa).

title: IT Architect Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: Git, TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: IT Architect Consultant Mission At Sofrecom, we offer advice to operators and governments, both in France and abroad. In this context, the mission of the consultants in IS Architecture is to support our customers as they implement their digital transformation. In particular, they must help them master the existing IS and build a target based on best practices (Tmforum, ITIL, COBIT) to ensure alignment with the business strategy: Contribute to defining the information system blueprints by applying the TOGAF standard Urbanize information systems and organize the various IS components, including common standards Define the IS transformation roadmaps and any resources required Expertise and skills Consultants must have had significant experience with functional, technical and enterprise architecture projects. Their multicultural expertise and skills must enable them to work within a team of multi-expert consultants. Their assets - autonomy, audacity, creativity and strong analytical and synthesis skills. They must be expert in BSS (BSCS, MsDynamic, Zsmart...etc.), OSS (KPSA, Comptel, Netcracker...etc.), collaborative tools, digital platforms and TOGAF, TMforum and COBIT standards. Experience 5 years of higher education, successful collaboration on the IS transformation of operators - convergent IS studies, customer experience, digitalization of the customer journey... They may have contributed to defining the IT strategy of telecoms operators or governments in order to launch new offers, modernize obsolete IT solutions, or improve the level of satisfaction of internal and external customers...

title: IP Network, Security & SDN/NFV Telecom Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: IP Network, Security & SDN/NFV Telecom Consultant Mission He/she ensures a consulting role at our customers, guaranteeing the operation and the security of their networks. He/she analyzes the structure, settings, performances and the existing network services, and makes recommendations. He/she calls for technical solutions for introducing new services and conducts or technically performs the definition and validation process of IP architectures. He/she intervenes on complex configurations. Expertise and skills Knowledge of the TCPIP L2-L7 protocol and of materials, from the international backbone to the datacenter switch Regular comprehension of the customers typologies, machines and services, connected to the network Investment in the evolutions of the IP networks, SDN/NFV/SDWAN particularly... Experience With a Telecom engineer background (or general engineer with a Telecom specialization), he/she has an at least 5 years proven experience in backbone or secured platform network architectures.

title: Infrastructure Architect
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Infrastructure Architect Mission He/She intervenes on client projects requesting hosting on active infrastructures. He/she co -constructs with the application architect the technical infrastructure solution to be implemented on the server and/or storage perimeter for projects that require a non-standard or customized brick. He/she acts either as the person in charge of the technical design of a project or as a contributor on his/her technical field to the other teams of the department. He/she provides support to the deployment teams and the client project driver in implementing the solution in accordance with defined standards and processes. He/She is a player in the improvement of the proposed infrastructure product catalogue. Expertise and skills He/she is able to collaborate with the Project Leader in the different phases of the project. He/she adapts and has a technical curiosity because technological developments are fast and must be assimilated in order to optimize the existing one. He/she is versatile, has a taste for technology and is creative in identifying appropriate technical solutions. He/she can work with teams of experts but also with other departments of the company. Experience Graduates from a leading engineering school, he/she has at least 6 years of experience in the field of Complex Solutions Architecture, support and advice to clients.

title: Fixed Networks Telecom Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Fixed Networks Telecom Consultant Mission He/she ensures a consulting role at our customers, providing the adequate development of very high-speed telecommunication networks infrastructures. He/she analyzes the performances of the existing networks and services and makes recommendations. He/she calls for technical solutions for introducing new services and conducts the setting up of these projects. Expertise and skills Knowledge of the very high-speed fixed networks architectures (Fttx, collect, backbone…) and of the associated technologies (xDSL, GPON/FTTx, MSAN, IP, WDM…) Analyzis and ability to synthesize the technical issues Experience With a Telecom engineer background (or general engineer with a Telecom specialization), He/she has an at least 5 years experience in WAN, fixed access technical environments and in projects roll out. He/she has a good knowledge of project management.

title: Business consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: Business consultant Mission He/she supports our clients in their business acceleration and transformation programs in the B2C and B2B markets on projects of: Design or improvement of product and service offerings, mobile, Internet and convergents Strategic Marketing, Operational Marketing Management and improvement of operational performance Management of operational projects (product Launches, Business Projects) Management of transversal projects (PMOs) Expertise and skills His analytical and synthetic mind and his excellent presentation skills both in writing and orally allow him to carry out consulting missions with high-level interlocutors. He/she knows how to combine an operational approach with real strategic thinking. Experience Graduated from a major business, engineering or university school, he/she has 2 to 5 years of experience in the telecom environment, consulting firm and/or operator (s) in France or abroad. He/she is open-minded, curious and has a taste for challenge. He/she has a perfect command of English.

title: AMOA IT Consultant
why_fit: skill overlap: Git, TypeScript; multilingual: French, Arabic, English; good entry point at Sofrecom
description: AMOA IT Consultant Mission At Sofrecom, consultants in IS Project Management Support assist our operator and government customers in their digital transformation projects. They support them from the realization of IS impact studies to the implementation of the technical solution. This mission involves all stages of an Information System re-design project: Compilation of requirements; Drafting of specifications and RFPs; Facilitation of workshops to express needs with the business lines; Architecture studies; Assistance in validating project milestones (functional and technical specifications, test phases... Expertise and skills Consultants are experts in BSS and OSS solutions (BSCS, Zsamart, ... etc.) and UML, BPMN, and TMforum standards. Their interpersonal and writing skills, their analytical and summarizing skills and their autonomy are assets for carrying out consulting missions with high-level contacts. Experience 5 years of higher education (what field?), IS Project Management Support consultants must have significant experience in projects such as: implementation of CRM, unified order taking, omnicanality, convergent billing, incident management, activation and provisioning, payment platform... They are able to work in multicultural environments. They are willing to undertake business trips abroad.
